Name: Mike McCarthy
Achievements: Super Bowl XLV champion; 2 NFC Championships
Info: Veteran head coach who led Green Bay to Super Bowl XLV. Brought a disciplined system to Dallas in 2020.

Name: Brian Schottenheimer
Achievements: Multiple playoff OC; Known for power run game
Info: Experienced coordinator known for establishing physical run-first offenses.

Name: Mike Zimmer
Achievements: 2x NFL Coach of the Year nominee; Built elite Vikings defenses
Info: Highly respected defensive mind returning to coaching after stint as Vikings HC.

Name: Brian Baldinger
Info: Expert in developing offensive linemen. Key to Cowboys' elite OL units.

Name: Joe Whitt Jr.
Info: Renowned DB coach who developed elite secondary talent throughout career.

Name: John Fassel
Achievements: Known for building elite special teams units
Info: Widely considered one of NFL's top special teams coaches.

Name: Jimmy Johnson
Achievements: 2x Super Bowl champion (XXVII-XXVIII); 1990 Coach of the Year
Info: Built the Cowboys dynasty of the 1990s. Drafted Emmitt Smith and drafted/developed the core championship team.

Name: Barry Switzer
Achievements: Super Bowl XXX champion; Only coach to win both college and NFL championships
Info: Won Super Bowl XXX in first full season. Known for keeping the dynasty running after Johnson.

Name: Dave Campo
Achievements: 3 years as HC; Previously Cowboys DC
Info: Long-time Cowboys defensive coordinator who had a difficult 3-year run as head coach.

Name: Bill Parcells
Achievements: 2x Super Bowl champion with Giants; Turned around multiple franchises
Info: Hall of Fame coach who stabilized Cowboys organization and drafted Tony Romo.

Name: Wade Phillips
Achievements: Multiple playoff appearances; Known as elite DC
Info: Experienced NFL coach who won division titles but could not break through in playoffs.

Name: Jason Garrett
Info: Long-time Cowboys offensive coordinator who became HC. Known for culture building but playoff struggles.

Name: Norv Turner
Achievements: Key architect of 1990s Cowboys offense; 2x Super Bowl champion
Info: Brilliant offensive mind who designed the Cowboys' championship offense around Aikman and Irvin.

Name: Ernie Zampese
Achievements: Super Bowl XXX champion; Known for West Coast offense
Info: Helped maintain Cowboys offensive excellence through third Super Bowl win.

Name: Dave Wannstedt
Achievements: Key architect of Cowboys dominant 1990s defense; 2x Super Bowl champion
Info: Built the Cowboys' physical and aggressive championship defense.

Name: Tony Wise
Achievements: Developed elite OL unit; 2x Super Bowl champion
Info: Coached the legendary Cowboys offensive line including Larry Allen and Nate Newton.
